title: Triplast Large Roll of Bubble Wrap 500mm x 100m – Air Bubbles Packaging for House Moving & Packing Storage Boxes
features: CONTENTS: One large roll of premium bubble wrap | ROLL WIDTH: 500mm | WRAP LENGTH: 100m (unfolded) | BUBBLE SIZE: 10mm diameter | FILM THICKNESS: 30gsm | USE: Ideal for packing, wrapping, void fill & insulation | PROUDLY MADE in UK

SUPERIOR PROTECTION: Our cutting-edge manufacturing process produces fuller, stronger air bubbles that stay inflated for longer under pressure – giving your items long-lasting protection from knocks, drops and bumps, during transit or storage

LIGHTWEIGHT YET ROBUST: Featuring a heavy-duty 30gsm film thickness, this protective wrap strikes the perfect balance between strength, flexibility & weight – delivering exceptional impact resistance while keeping parcels light and postage costs low!

EASY & FUSS-FREE PACKING: Flexible and simple to use, this air cushioning wrap conforms effortlessly around items of all shapes and sizes for fast, efficient packing – simply cut to length with scissors and secure with tape
REDUCE, REUSE & RECYCLE: Made with 30% recycled materials, Triplast Bubble Wrap is fully recyclable (LDPE 4) and designed for reuse – helping you protect both, your items and the planet!
description: Product Description Triplast’s Bubble Wrap is an absolute packaging essential that is extremely useful as protective wrapping and void fill for parcels for shipping & storage and also for insulation purposes. Just roll out the bubble wrap, glide your scissors through it for a smooth & hassle-free cut and secure with tape. With a 30 gsm thickness and dense 10mm diameter bubbles, this bubble wrap offers the perfect balance between durability and weight so that your items remain completely protected while on the road without adding to the packaging weight. It also easily conforms to odd shapes and can cover any type of surface, big or small. Designed to offer consistent cushioning and long-term protection for precious, delicate or fragile items, this bubble wrap is ideal for personal, office, business & industrial use. It is widely used as a void filler or a surface cover to prevent dents or inadvertent damage during transportation or storage. This plastic wrap is also useful when packing for moving house, as greenhouse lining to protect plants during the winter, or to insulate windows for temperature control. Transit Protection This bubble wrap offers a protective barrier that avoids inadvertent damage and keeps items safe while in transit or in the mail. Safe storage Cover up and secure items while in storage. 30 gsm thickness for a robust yet flexible cushioning that will conform to any odd shape of any size. Void fill Use it to fill up empty space while packing to ensure the items remain securely tucked in with no room to move or budge Insulation Cover plants with bubble wrap to protect them from frost. During the day, the air pockets will warm up, providing a greenhouse effect that will keep them safe. About Triplast We are a UK based manufacturer, distributor and supplier of packaging products & office supplies including cardboard boxes, bubble wrap, kraft wrapping paper, corrugated cardboard paper, plastic mailing bags, bubble padded envelopes, cardboard & paper envelopes and other ecommerce, retail & industrial packaging products. Our years of experience and well established presence in the flexible packaging industry coupled with our state-of-the-art automated machinery means you can be rest assured when buying our products. We have great confidence in our products but if for any reason you are unhappy with your purchase, please send us a message and we promise to revert to you with a swift resolution.
